description: AWS MSK (Amazon Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka) cluster monitoring based on Open Monitoring (JMX Exporter + Node Exporter) Prometheus metrics.
title: AWS MSK Cluster

5f40bd3a-8034-47f7-8351-b92cc162af2e.name: cluster_name
5f40bd3a-8034-47f7-8351-b92cc162af2e.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'cluster_name'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name = 'kafka_server_brokertopicmetrics_bytesin_total'

c701d33a-dfb9-47d1-b4c0-29c5d8b2f826.name: broker_id
c701d33a-dfb9-47d1-b4c0-29c5d8b2f826.queryValue:
SELECT DISTINCT(JSONExtractString(labels, 'broker_id'))
FROM signoz_metrics.time_series_v4
WHERE metric_name = 'kafka_server_brokertopicmetrics_bytesin_total'

widgets.description: Number of active Kafka controllers (should be 1).
widgets.title: Active Controllers

widgets.description: Partitions without a leader. Should be 0.
widgets.title: Offline Partitions

widgets.description: Partitions with fewer in-sync replicas than configured. Should be 0.
widgets.title: Under-Replicated Partitions

widgets.description: Aggregate producer bytes-in rate across brokers.
widgets.title: Bytes In / sec

widgets.description: Aggregate consumer bytes-out rate across brokers.
widgets.title: Bytes Out / sec

widgets.description: Aggregate incoming message rate.
widgets.title: Messages In / sec

widgets.description: Per-broker producer bytes-in rate.
widgets.title: Bytes In per Broker

widgets.description: Per-broker consumer bytes-out rate.
widgets.title: Bytes Out per Broker

widgets.description: Per-broker incoming message rate.
widgets.title: Messages In per Broker

widgets.description: Rejected bytes rate (quota, invalid records).
widgets.title: Bytes Rejected per Broker

widgets.description: Partitions under-replicated on each broker.
widgets.title: Under-Replicated Partitions per Broker

widgets.description: Rate of in-sync replica shrinks.
widgets.title: ISR Shrinks / sec

widgets.description: Rate of in-sync replica expansions.
widgets.title: ISR Expands / sec

widgets.description: Maximum replica lag across followers.
widgets.title: Replica Max Lag

widgets.description: 99th percentile total time in ms for Produce requests.
widgets.title: Produce Request Total Time (p99)

widgets.description: 99th percentile total time in ms for FetchConsumer requests.
widgets.title: FetchConsumer Request Total Time (p99)

widgets.description: 99th percentile time requests spend waiting in the request queue.
widgets.title: Request Queue Time (p99)

widgets.description: Average fraction of time request handler threads are idle.
widgets.title: Request Handler Idle %

widgets.description: CPU utilization per broker host (from node_exporter).
widgets.title: Broker CPU %

widgets.description: Used memory per broker host.
widgets.title: Broker Memory Used

widgets.description: Disk utilization on broker data volumes.
widgets.title: Broker Disk Usage %

widgets.description: Network receive and transmit bytes per broker.
widgets.title: Broker Network Throughput

widgets.description: Heap memory used per broker JVM.
widgets.title: JVM Heap Used

widgets.description: Seconds spent in GC per second (collection rate).
widgets.title: JVM GC Time / sec
